base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of boss_dracula_body_parts — a pickup_item (health_pickup) from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Dracula's body parts — 5 macabre quest items (Rib / Heart / Eye / Nail / Ring) scattered across mansions. Collect all 5 + Cross to finish game. Central gameplay mechanic. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
